creator: tarzan_ug@hotmail.com
text:
I went and created an account just for this. I 2023. The djbdns is just perfect software for what it does, no need to "update" it. So what if it is 20 years old.

There are a lot of real bugs in some other packaged that are not being fixed for years, and this is being remove because it does not have any bugs needed to be fixed? We are really living in idiocracy. https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0387808/


"It's software that works and needs no updating and contrary to what some believe isn't buggy -- it just works(tm)."

It caused a major pain for me to install it from source and compile and then send it over to pfsense ... all that work... sad ... very sad...
